descriptions.agent: Delegate a subtask to a fresh sub-agent with a clean conversation history. Returns the sub-agent's final text plus basic stats.
descriptions.archive_manager: Manage archive files: list contents, extract files, and create archives (zip/tar/tar.gz/tar.bz2/tar.xz).
descriptions.ask_user: Ask the user one or more questions with optional fixed choices. Use when requirements are ambiguous or you need a decision.
descriptions.batch_notification: Send batch notifications to multiple channels. Useful for alerting across different platforms simultaneously.
descriptions.cache_manager: Manage cache with get/set/delete operations, TTL management, bulk operations, and cache statistics.
descriptions.canvas_publish: Publish a canvas document (HTML page or printable report) into the workspace canvas panel.
descriptions.chat_workflow_emit: Publish a structured workflow card in the chat with executable read-only steps and JSON arguments.
descriptions.checklist_generator: Generate checklists from workflows, rules, or manual definitions. Export to Markdown, JSON, HTML, or PDF.
descriptions.script_agent: Delegate a focused computation or file-generation task to the Script Agent (runs Python in the code_execution sandbox).
descriptions.code_agent: Delegate a focused computation or file-generation task to the Script Agent (runs Python in the code_execution sandbox).
descriptions.code_execution: Run Python inside an isolated subprocess sandbox with CPU/memory caps and a per-session workspace as cwd.
descriptions.config_file: Read, write, query, merge, and convert structured config files (JSON, YAML, TOML) with format auto-detection.
descriptions.cron_create: Create a scheduled cron job with a cron expression, target type, and optional payload.
descriptions.cron_delete: Remove a cron job by its UUID.
descriptions.cron_list: List cron jobs, optionally filtered by status and enabled flag.
descriptions.csv_processor: Read, query, write, analyze, and convert CSV/TSV files with delimiter sniffing and encoding handling.
descriptions.data_aggregate: Aggregate and summarize tabular data with group-by operations, aggregation functions, and pivot tables.
descriptions.data_clean: Clean tabular data: remove duplicates, handle missing values, trim whitespace, and normalize types.
descriptions.data_merge: Merge and join multiple datasets with inner, outer, left, and right joins or concatenation.
descriptions.data_transform: Transform tabular data: column renaming, type casting, value mapping, derived columns, and string transforms.
descriptions.data_validate: Validate tabular data against schemas: type checks, range validation, required fields, patterns, and uniqueness.
descriptions.date_calculator: Date arithmetic, business-days calculations, timezone conversion, and flexible date formatting.
descriptions.doc_classifier: Classify documents (invoice, contract, report, resume, etc.) using rule-based patterns or LLM analysis.
descriptions.email_batch_send: Send batch emails with per-recipient template variables, rate limiting, and progress tracking.
descriptions.email_send: Send emails via SMTP with HTML/plain content, attachments, templates, and multiple recipients.
descriptions.emit_ui_patch: Apply incremental JSON-Patch updates to an already-emitted gen UI tree, validated server-side.
descriptions.emit_ui_tree: Emit a validated gen UI tree that renders inline in the chat: cards, dashboards, tables, KPIs, alerts, and more.
descriptions.enter_plan_mode: Enter planning mode and create a step-by-step plan without executing any actions yet.
descriptions.excel_generator: Generate Excel files (.xlsx) with multiple sheets, cell formatting, formulas, and basic charts.
descriptions.excel_reader: Read data from Excel files (.xlsx) with sheet selection, cell range extraction, and flexible output formats.
descriptions.exit_plan_mode: Exit planning mode and return to normal execution. Optionally start executing the created plan.
descriptions.external_api: Make HTTP requests to external APIs with authentication, request/response transformation, and rate limiting.
descriptions.file_manager: List, move, copy, delete, create directories, and inspect files inside the allowed sandbox.
descriptions.folder_operations: Manage virtual folders: create, list, get tree, move, add/remove files, search, and read extracted text.
descriptions.html_processor: Read and analyze HTML files: plain text, links, tables, meta tags, and conversion to Markdown or plain text.
descriptions.image_ocr: Extract text from images using OCR. Supports Chinese and English text with high accuracy.
descriptions.json_parser: Parse JSON, query with JSONPath, validate against schemas, and transform JSON structures.
descriptions.list_ui_components: Return the gen UI component catalog (kinds + prop hints) before authoring an emit_ui_tree payload.
descriptions.load_skill: Load the full instructions of an Agent Skill by name. Returns SKILL.md plus bundled resources and scripts.
descriptions.markdown_processor: Read and parse Markdown files, extract TOC and fenced code blocks, and convert to HTML or plain text.
descriptions.notification: Send notifications to channels like DingTalk, Feishu, WeChat Work. Supports text, markdown, cards, and @mentions.
descriptions.oa_adapter: High-level OA adapter wrapping oa_api and web/RPA tools to login, fetch/submit forms, import reimbursements, and export.
descriptions.oa_api: Connect to OA systems via REST API. Supports submit, approve, reject, and query with multiple authentication methods.
descriptions.oa_export: Export data to OA systems with format conversion and batch processing (workflow instances, forms, users, and more).
descriptions.oa_import: Import data from OA systems with field mapping and batch processing (workflow instances, forms, users, and more).
descriptions.pdf_generator: Generate PDF documents with text, tables, images, headers/footers, watermarks, and page numbering.
descriptions.pdf_reader: Extract text content and metadata from PDF files. Supports page-by-page extraction with optional page ranges.
descriptions.read_skill_resource: Read a file bundled with an Agent Skill (references/, assets/, or root-level docs).
descriptions.report_generator: Generate data-driven reports from templates with charts, tables, metrics, and PDF/Word/HTML/Markdown output.
descriptions.rule_matcher: Match data against rule sets, evaluate conditions with various operators, and aggregate the results.
descriptions.run_skill_script: Run a script bundled with an installed Agent Skill, constrained to the skill directory.
descriptions.speech_to_text: Transcribe speech from an audio file to text using OpenAI Whisper when configured.
descriptions.sql_query: Execute SELECT-only SQL on tabular data. Supports JOINs, WHERE clauses, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, and aggregations.
descriptions.task_create: Create a new background task. The task is queued and executed asynchronously; returns the task ID.
descriptions.task_get: Get the status and details of a task by its ID.
descriptions.task_kill: Kill a running task by its ID. Sends an abort signal and transitions the task to 'killed' status.
descriptions.task_list: List tasks with optional status/type filters.
descriptions.task_output: Read the output/log of a task starting from a byte offset. Useful for streaming live task output.
descriptions.task_update: Update a task's status, progress, or output.
descriptions.template_filler: Fill templates using Jinja2 with variable substitution, conditionals, loops, filters, and template inheritance.
descriptions.text_processor: Professional text-file processor: encoding auto-detect, regex search, stats, head/tail, and unified diff.
descriptions.text_splitter: Split text into chunks by characters, tokens, sentences, or paragraphs with configurable overlap.
descriptions.todo_read: Read the current task list for this session.
descriptions.todo_write: Create or update a structured task list with id, content, and status (pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled).
descriptions.vector_search: Semantic vector search via Milvus: generate embeddings and find similar items with optional similarity threshold.
descriptions.web_click: Click elements on web pages by selector. Supports single, double, right click, and navigation waiting.
descriptions.web_form_fill: Fill web forms by selector and value: text inputs, checkboxes, radios, selects, and file uploads.
descriptions.web_login: Perform automated login on web applications with credential input and session persistence.
descriptions.web_scraper: Fetch and parse web pages, extracting content using CSS or XPath selectors.
descriptions.web_screenshot: Take screenshots of web pages or specific elements (full page, viewport, or element) in PNG/JPEG.
descriptions.workflow_cancel: Cancel a running or paused workflow execution.
descriptions.workflow_list: List available workflows in the system. Returns name, id, status, description, and last run time.
descriptions.workflow_pause: Pause a currently running workflow execution.
descriptions.workflow_run: Trigger a workflow execution by flow ID or name. Returns an execution ID for tracking progress.
descriptions.workflow_status: Get the current status and details of a workflow execution by execution ID.
descriptions.word_generator: Generate Word documents (.docx) with headings, paragraphs, tables, lists, images, and custom styling.
descriptions.word_reader: Extract text from Word documents (.docx, .docm) and legacy .doc via pyantiword with optional LibreOffice fallback.

channels.consoleHint: Console channel uses default logging; no extra configuration.
channels.title: 消息通道
channels.subtitle: Configure notification channels (DingTalk, Feishu, WeCom, and more).
channels.emptyHint: Add a channel to send messages to DingTalk, Feishu, or other systems.

folders.deleteConfirm: Delete this folder and all contents?
folders.title: Folders
folders.description: Organize knowledge into folders and browse their files.

fileList.emptyFolder: No files in this folder yet
fileList.emptyHint: Drop files here or click Upload above

project.title: Code project mode
project.description: Bind this folder to an on-disk directory so the coding agent and project_* tools can read, edit and grep inside it.
project.pathHint: Must be an existing directory and (when configured) inside FILES_PROJECTS_ALLOWED_ROOTS.
project.runAgent: Run coding agent on this project
project.runAgentPrompt: In project `{{name}}` ({{path}}), explore the structure and propose the next concrete improvement to make.

viewer.empty: Select a file from the tree to preview it here.
viewer.binaryNotice: This file appears to be binary and cannot be previewed inline.
viewer.truncatedNotice: File is too large to preview in full. Use the coding agent to grep specific lines.
viewer.sendPrompt: Open `{{path}}` in the active project, summarise what it does, and propose any improvements.

history.title: History
history.empty: No commits found for this path.
history.pickCommit: Select a commit to view its diff and contents.

forgotPassword.subtitle: 输入注册邮箱，我们会发送一封包含重置链接的邮件（演示环境不会真正发送）。
forgotPassword.demoOnly: 演示功能：未连接后端重置接口，不会发送邮件或修改密码。如需正式找回密码，请联系管理员或等待后续版本。
forgotPassword.submitted: 如果该邮箱已注册，我们会在几分钟内发送重置链接，请注意查收。

errors.passwordMismatch: 两次输入的密码不一致

register.title: 创建账号
register.subtitle: 注册一个新的 LeAgent 账号

mcp.pageDescription: 管理 Model Context Protocol 服务器连接、查看健康状态与可用工具。
mcp.noServersHint: 点击「添加服务器」以连接 stdio 或 SSE 端点。
mcp.selectServerHint: 在左侧列表中点击一个服务器以查看配置、工具与健康信息。

skills.pageDescription: 查看、启用或安装 AI 技能，扩展助手的能力与知识。
skills.emptyInstalledHint: 前往「技能商店」浏览并安装技能。
skills.hubCatalogHint: Defaults to the public example repo; change to any GitHub repo that hosts skill folders, then click Load to refresh the list.
skills.hubCatalogInvalidUrl: Enter a valid GitHub repo URL, e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo or a /tree/… path.
skills.hubEmptyHint: 尝试更换关键词或稍后再试。
skills.installFromUrlHint: Use an https:// direct link to a .zip or .tar.gz. The archive must contain a single skill folder with SKILL.md.
skills.author: 作者
skills.readOnlyHint: This skill is built-in or read-only; SKILL.md cannot be edited here.
skills.binaryNoPreview: Binary or non-text content cannot be previewed.
skills.truncatedFileWarning: File is very large; the editor shows a truncated portion only.
skills.skillFileEditorHint: Edit the full SKILL.md (including YAML front matter). The name must match the skill folder.

webhooks.retryInvalid: Retry count must be between 0 and 10
webhooks.timeoutInvalid: Timeout must be between 5 and 120 seconds
webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Manage outbound HTTP webhooks and delivery logs
webhooks.emptyHint: Create a webhook to receive event notifications.
webhooks.deliveryLogHint: Expand a webhook to load recent deliveries
